zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell於1408年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，他的父親Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell21歲，母親Janet Herries18歲。他和Janet Forrester至少有1個兒子。他去世於1485年5月8日在他的家鄉享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell was born in 1408, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell, was 21 and his mother, Janet Herries, was 18. He had at least 1 son with Janet Forrester. He died on 8 May 1485, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell est né en 1408, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Janet Herries, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Janet Forrester. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1485, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell 1408 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell 21 und seine Mutter Janet Herries 18. Er hatte mit Janet Forrester mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 8. Mai 1485 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell è nato il nel 1408 nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Janet Herries, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Janet Forrester. Morì il 8 maggio 1485, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Maxwell 2nd Lord Maxwell(이)가 1408년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Herries(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Janet Forrester(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1485년 5월 8일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.
